globalNews.title: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
globalNews.summary: Kenneth Law admitted charges relating to Canadian victims - but families say he should also be charged in the UK over 79 deaths in Britain.

globalNews.title: Nato condemns Russian 'recklessness' after drone hits Romanian residential block
globalNews.summary: Romania will hold an emergency meeting following the incident, in which two people were injured.

globalNews.title: 'Controversial' North Korean invasion setting for next Call of Duty game
globalNews.summary: Developer Infinity Ward said the game will be "grounded in the military authenticity" the series is known for.

globalNews.title: Former US attorney general Pam Bondi testifies in congressional Epstein probe
globalNews.summary: The testimony comes about a month after America's top prosecutor was ousted by US President Donald Trump.

globalNews.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
globalNews.summary: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.

cryptoNews.title: Ethereum analysts say ‘downside pressure’ remains as $1.8K becomes key
cryptoNews.summary: Analysts warn Ether’s downside risks remain elevated as traders closely watch the $1,800 support zone for stability.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin ETFs bleed $2.8B in record nine-day outflow streak
cryptoNews.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded a nine-day outflow streak totaling $2.84 billion, surpassing an eight-session outflow run in February 2025.

cryptoNews.title: Why is Stellar's XLM up by over 50% this week?
cryptoNews.summary: XLM rallied after US financial giant DTCC announced a partnership with the Stellar Network, but it still risks a sharp downside in the coming weeks.

cryptoNews.title: NYSE parent ICE pushes ‘level playing field’ for 24/7 onchain perps
cryptoNews.summary: ICE’s CEO said regulators need to create a “level playing field” for launching 24/7 onchain perps contracts, which are already trading on exchanges such as Hyperliquid.

aiNews.title: Cognition’s Scott Wu says AI coding agents shouldn’t replace humans
aiNews.summary: Cognition makes Devin, the first and arguably most successful AI coding agent. But famed coder Wu says it isn't designed to supplant human programmers.

aiNews.summary: If you're looking for a fun way to connect with nature while collecting bird species on an app like Pokémon, give this smart feeder a try.
